_risk_level_doc: Mechanical rename + chmod + minimal code edit in test files only. No shared infrastructure touched. No user-triggered code paths affected.

requirement.original: OOS item F — cleanliness of hooks/tests/ underscore-prefix files. Rename 7 files to test_ prefix, ensure 755 permissions, add mktemp+trap cleanup where needed, fix stale comments.
requirement.clarified: Rename 7 verification scripts in hooks/tests/ from _acN_verify.sh/_final_sweep.sh to test_ prefix. Set mode 755 on all renamed files in git. Add mktemp+trap to the 3 files that use fixed /tmp paths. Fix 1 stale comment in _final_sweep.sh.
requirement.what: File rename + permission fix + /tmp cleanup + comment correction in hooks/tests/
requirement.why: Naming convention violation relative to existing test_push_sentinel_abort.sh; missing executable bits; /tmp collision risk; stale comment

included: chmod 755 / git mode 100755 on all 7 renamed files
stale comment fix in test_final_sweep.sh line 2
excluded: Historical docs/dev/* report files that mention old names in prose

success_criteria: No file with _ac or _final_sweep prefix exists in hooks/tests/
All 8 .sh files in hooks/tests/ have git mode 100755
No fixed /tmp literal paths in test_ac1_verify.sh, test_ac5_verify.sh, test_final_sweep.sh
test_final_sweep.sh line 2 no longer says 'invoke each AC's verifier'
bash hooks/tests/test_final_sweep.sh exits 0 with all PASS lines
constraints: Rename must preserve git history (git mv or equivalent, not delete+recreate)
Git mode bits must be set explicitly — git mv preserves source mode 100644
mktemp-derived variable must be threaded into the inline Python snippet in test_final_sweep.sh that currently hardcodes /tmp/push-analyst-phase7.py
Do not modify docs/dev/ historical artifacts

out_of_path_observed_but_not_touched: hooks/tests/INDEX.md (auto-generated, references old names — will update via doc-sync)
docs/dev/*report*.json and docs/dev/*.md (historical prose references — read-only)

root_cause_analysis.symptom: 7 shell scripts in hooks/tests/ use _acN_verify.sh / _final_sweep.sh naming, violating the test_*.sh convention, and are non-executable
root_cause_analysis.root_cause: Dev created verification scripts during spec-20260518-225715 cycle using an ad-hoc private-script naming convention (_prefix) rather than the established test_*.sh pattern in hooks/tests/
root_cause_analysis.root_cause_commit: 1a1d058 feat(dev-cycle): Cycle 2 remediation — test-writer infra + cleanliness + style
root_cause_analysis.why_introduced: Naming was chosen to signal 'internal/helper' but the directory convention is test_*.sh for all shell tests
root_cause_analysis.why_problematic: Convention inconsistency, missing executable bits, /tmp collision risk, stale comment
observations: ls -la hooks/tests/ confirmed all 7 files mode -rw-r--r-- (644) (inferred from direct ls output)
test_push_sentinel_abort.sh is -rwxr-xr-x (755) — the model file (inferred from ls output)
git ls-files -s shows 100644 for all 7, 100755 for test_push_sentinel_abort.sh (inferred from git command output)
/tmp usage confirmed by grep across all 7 files (inferred from file content read)
No active callers found by git grep across agents/, commands/, hooks/, scripts/, settings.json (inferred from grep results)
root_cause_analysis.localization_evidence: Direct ls -la + git ls-files + grep across files confirmed all problem locations without ambiguity
root_cause_analysis.located_source: hooks/tests/ directory — all 7 target files identified at lines 1-20 of each

research_findings.reason: Straightforward naming convention fix with clear reference pattern in the same directory

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex confirmed scope is minimal and correct. Flagged 5 items: (1) 'only INDEX.md references' phrasing too broad — historical docs also mention old names; (2) mktemp+trap scope correct for 7 targets; (3) stale comment identification correct; (4) test_ prefix confirmed; (5) scope creep guards — do not update historical docs, do not hand-edit INDEX.md, set git mode bits not just filesystem bits.

findings.issue: 'Only INDEX.md references' phrasing too broad — historical docs/dev artifacts also mention old names but are not callers
findings.proposed_fix: Change claim to: 'No active callers in settings/scripts/commands/hooks other than generated INDEX files. Historical docs/dev artifacts mention old names and are intentionally out of scope.'
findings.rationale: Incorporated into scope section and out_of_path_observed_but_not_touched

findings.issue: mktemp+trap scope correct for 7 targets; note test_push_sentinel_abort.sh /tmp/agentic-commit/ usage is intentional fixture behavior
findings.proposed_fix: Add explicit exclusion: test_push_sentinel_abort.sh is not one of the 7 targets; its /tmp/agentic-commit usage is intentional product-path fixture setup already cleaned by its own trap
findings.rationale: Added to Won't Have / Non-Goals section

findings.issue: Stale comment identification correct; proposed fix text: 'run inline AC checks and print PASS/FAIL summary.'
findings.proposed_fix: Replace line 2 with: # Final sweep — run inline AC checks and print PASS/FAIL summary.
findings.rationale: Incorporated into Stale Comment Fix section with codex's exact proposed text

findings.issue: test_ prefix is the right choice (matches existing shell + Python convention)
Guard against scope creep: do not update historical docs; ensure git mode 100755 not just filesystem chmod; test_final_sweep.sh must still run after rename
findings.proposed_fix: Add ACs: old names absent, new names present, git ls-files -s shows 100755, no fixed /tmp literals, test_final_sweep.sh exits 0
findings.rationale: Incorporated into ACs AC1-AC5 and dev constraints

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: 5 codex findings reviewed: 4 applied (scope wording, test_push_sentinel_abort exclusion, stale comment fix text, ACs hardened); 1 logged as observation_only (test_ prefix confirmation)
